description: Daily trade ideas log — extended each session

entries.trade: Maintain high duration hedge ratio — UST rally to continue
entries.rationale: Rapid bull steepening of the yield curve and excessive stretching in the 2s10s segment leave long duration vulnerable to structural mean reversion.

entries.trade: Buy ZAR carry via options or spot/forward
entries.rationale: Spot positioning offers a high-yielding entry point to capture South African carry on specific macro-driven sessions.
Sovereign risk protection is underpriced relative to the macro backdrop.
Asymmetry favours paying as spreads sit near compressed levels — excess compression leaves limited carry versus the risk of a widening.
Declining oil prices and rallying global rates support BoP improvement in both economies, providing a constructive backdrop for sovereign spread compression.

entries.trade: Buy PS 200/195, sell call 215 — zero cost structure
entries.rationale: SNB defends excessive CHF appreciation; BOJ defends excessive JPY depreciation. Dual CB intervention anchors CHFJPY in a range. Stable spot and positive forward curve allow monetisation via roll (roll to spot). Short vega is the structural expression given compressed realised vol in the cross.

Japan government draft blueprint urges BOJ to support private demand and keep rates low, citing coordination provisions. Dovish political pressure complicates further BOJ tightening. BOJ held at 1% (31y high) with July 30-31 meeting expected on hold. Yen near multi-decade lows (161.73). Less hikes likely add topside pressure to USDJPY. EKO at 166 caps cost while targeting the trend move.

entry_level.note: Cheap to TV — will look well when added to book

entries.rationale: Same macro driver as 2026-06-25-002. Cheap digital (15.25% vs 18% TV) offers attractive risk/reward for a sustained USDJPY break above 166 on continued BOJ passivity. Complements the 1m EKO structure with longer tenor and binary payoff.
